snapshots.description: Customizer on first render: size pills, topping list, and the price/CTA strip are all visible inside the customizer modal container. Region is the whole modal (`pizzaBuilderScreen`) — web maps to `[data-testid='customizer-modal']`, mobile to `~screen-pizza-builder` — so the snapshot captures the full builder surface rather than a single leaf element. Bucketed per (market, language) so JP/MX/CH localizations don't collide on the same baseline.
After a size pill has been clicked — total reflects the size's price. Web target uses the size list region because the highlighted pill is the load-bearing visual change.
After one or more toppings are checked — selected state visual + updated total. Web-only here because the toppings-list locator has no mobile mapping for the responsive grid container today.
Confirm CTA enabled state — captured just before the user clicks Add to cart. Asserts the button's enabled appearance is stable per (market, language).
